body: [{"ac":1,"text":"scripts/integration/server-managed-workers-docker.sh or TestIntegration_ServerManagedWorker_NoProcessLeaks builds/runs an isolated Docker scenario from current source.","kind":"test-name","verifiable":true},{"ac":2,"text":"The scenario verifies explicit stop leaves no managed ddx work, fake claude, fake codex, shell, or sleep descendants running.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":3,"text":"The scenario verifies watchdog reap and server shutdown leave no managed worker or fake agent descendants running.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":4,"text":"The scenario calls stop twice and proves the second call is a no-op with no duplicate bead event and no unrelated process kill.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":5,"text":"cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/integration/... ./internal/server/... -run 'ServerManagedWorker|NoProcessLeaks' passes when Docker is available and skips with a clear message when Docker is unavailable.","kind":"build-gate","verifiable":true},{"ac":6,"text":"scripts/integration/server-managed-workers-docker.sh passes on a Docker-enabled host if implemented as a script.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":7,"text":"make install is run after the code change lands.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":8,"text":"lefthook run pre-commit passes.","kind":"build-gate","verifiable":true}]
